pi_items.source: O*NET Online search for SOC code 15-1252.00
O*NET Online search for SOC code 15-1252.00 matching Software Developers
Code analysis of setup_task.sh which simulates a high-frequency trading (HFT) matching engine with orders, balances, and a market publisher
O*NET Online classification for SOC code prefix 15-0000

Code analysis of setup_task.sh and verifier.py confirming the injected bugs and expected fixes explicitly test java concurrency, deadlock resolution (lock ordering), volatile visibility (isRunning), and thread-safe collections (MarketPublisher list).

privileged_info_summary: The task correctly maps to the 'Software Developers' occupation (SOC 15-1252.00) under the 'Computer and Mathematical' major group. The 'Finance and Insurance' industry accurately reflects the simulated HFT matching engine context. The required concurrency bug fixes explicitly demand knowledge of deadlock resolution, lock ordering, volatile visibility, and thread-safe collections, matching the claimed features. The Java code dataset is entirely synthetic and dynamically generated by setup scripts.
